title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. parvimajalis
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. parvimajalis, also known as the dwarf marsh orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its small, white flowers and slender stem. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. parvimajalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
